query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS reservations (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  product_id INT NOT NULL,
  product_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  booking_date DATE NOT NULL,
  people INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  extras_json TEXT,
  amount_total INT NOT NULL COMMENT 'Importe en céntimos',
  amount_paid INT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT 'Importe pagado en céntimos',
  status ENUM('draft','pending_payment','paid','failed','cancelled') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
  customer_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  customer_email VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  customer_phone VARCHAR(50),
  merchant_order VARCHAR(12) UNIQUE NOT NULL COMMENT 'Referencia única para Redsys (max 12 chars)',
  redsys_response TEXT COMMENT 'JSON con la respuesta completa de Redsys',
  redsys_ds_response VARCHAR(10) COMMENT 'Código de respuesta Redsys (0000-0099 = OK)',
  notes TEXT,
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  updated_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  paid_at BIGINT,
  INDEX idx_status (status),
  INDEX idx_merchant_order (merchant_order),
  INDEX idx_product_id (product_id),
  INDEX idx_customer_email (customer_email)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS reservations (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  product_id INT NOT NULL,
  product_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  booking_date DATE NOT NULL,
  people INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  extras_json TEXT,
  amount_total INT NOT NULL COMMENT 'Importe en céntimos',
  amount_paid INT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT 'Importe pagado en céntimos',
  status ENUM('draft','pending_payment','paid','failed','cancelled') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
  customer_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  customer_email VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  customer_phone VARCHAR(50),
  merchant_order VARCHAR(12) UNIQUE NOT NULL COMMENT 'Referencia única para Redsys (max 12 chars)',
  redsys_response TEXT COMMENT 'JSON con la respuesta completa de Redsys',
  redsys_ds_response VARCHAR(10) COMMENT 'Código de respuesta Redsys (0000-0099 = OK)',
  notes TEXT,
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  updated_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  paid_at BIGINT,
  INDEX idx_status (status),
  INDEX idx_merchant_order (merchant_order),
  INDEX idx_product_id (product_id),
  INDEX idx_customer_email (customer_email)
);
